requirement_topic.en: Czechia Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 捷克并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 捷克併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Czechia should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to ERÚ (Energy Regulatory Office) energy-sector oversight and ČEPS (transmission) and DSO (ČEZ Distribuce, E.ON Distribuce, PREdistribuce) technical review and grid-connection rules (Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy / přenosové soustavy). The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Czechia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Czechia uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Czechia is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. As a landlocked continental country, Czechia has no salt-mist requirements; cold-weather derating and condensation management are instead relevant considerations for commissioning files.
summary.zh: 捷克并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受ERÚ（能源监管局）的能源行业监管以及ČEPS（输电）和DSO（ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce、PREdistribuce）的技术审查和并网规则（Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy / přenosové soustavy）。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对捷克230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。捷克与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：捷克为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。作为内陆大陆国家，捷克无盐雾要求；调试文件的相关注意事项改为寒冷天气降额和冷凝管理。
summary.zht: 捷克併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受ERÚ（能源監管局）的能源行業監管以及ČEPS（輸電）和DSO（ČEZ Distribuce、E.ON Distribuce、PREdistribuce）的技術審查和併網規則（Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy / přenosové soustavy）。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對捷克230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。捷克與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：捷克為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。作為內陸大陸國家，捷克無鹽霧要求；調試文件的相關注意事項改為寒冷天氣降額和冷凝管理。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
ČEPS Pravidla provozování přenosové soustavy (transmission system operation rules)
DSO Pravidla provozování distribuční soustavy (distribution system operation rules — ČEZ Distribuce, E.ON Distribuce, PREdistribuce)
Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) — directly applicable in Czechia
Czechia low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Czechia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to ČEPS/DSO acceptance or ERÚ project review in Czechia.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非捷克50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为ČEPS/DSO认可或ERÚ项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非捷克50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為ČEPS/DSO認可或ERÚ項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Czechia ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Czechia-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Czechia voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For continental climate sites, include cold-weather derating, anti-condensation measures, frost-protection for outdoor enclosures, and earthing in the project file. Salt-mist derating is not applicable to Czechia.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代捷克ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、捷克专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称捷克电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于大陆气候现场，项目文件应包括寒冷天气降额、防冷凝措施、户外机柜防冻保护及接地。捷克不适用盐雾降额。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代捷克ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、捷克專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱捷克電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於大陸氣候現場，項目文件應包括寒冷天氣降額、防冷凝措施、戶外機櫃防凍保護及接地。捷克不適用鹽霧降額。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through ČEPS/DSO technical connection review and ERÚ project approval or oversight where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Czechia ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Czechia ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Czechia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document cold-weather derating and anti-condensation measures for continental climate installation. Verify current ERÚ, ČEPS, and DSO project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足捷克ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为捷克230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录大陆气候安装的寒冷天气降额和防冷凝措施。出货或调试前请直接核实现行ERÚ、ČEPS及DSO项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足捷克ERÚ/ČEPS/DSO併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為捷克230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄大陸氣候安裝的寒冷天氣降額和防冷凝措施。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行ERÚ、ČEPS及DSO項目要求。
